build.beforeDevCommand: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const cp=require('node:child_process');const script=process.argv[1];const candidates=[process.cwd(),path.resolve(process.cwd(),'apps'),path.resolve(process.cwd(),'..')];const appsDir=candidates.find((dir)=>fs.existsSync(path.join(dir,'package.json'))&&fs.existsSync(path.join(dir,'src-tauri','tauri.conf.json')));if(!appsDir){console.error('apps/package.json not found from cwd: '+process.cwd());process.exit(1);}const result=cp.spawnSync('corepack',['pnpm','--dir',appsDir,'run',script],{stdio:'inherit',shell:process.platform==='win32'});process.exit(result.status??1);" dev:desktop
build.beforeBuildCommand: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const cp=require('node:child_process');const script=process.argv[1];const candidates=[process.cwd(),path.resolve(process.cwd(),'apps'),path.resolve(process.cwd(),'..')];const appsDir=candidates.find((dir)=>fs.existsSync(path.join(dir,'package.json'))&&fs.existsSync(path.join(dir,'src-tauri','tauri.conf.json')));if(!appsDir){console.error('apps/package.json not found from cwd: '+process.cwd());process.exit(1);}const result=cp.spawnSync('corepack',['pnpm','--dir',appsDir,'run',script],{stdio:'inherit',shell:process.platform==='win32'});process.exit(result.status??1);" build:desktop

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
